title: Might Be: Tool Expansion
description: Simple mod that adds several tool and armor sidegrades inspired by the game Terraria.
body:
Might Be: Tool Expansion is a mod made for Minecraft Forge 1.20.1, it currently adds 3 New side-grades to tools and armor sets, **Crystallized Lightning**, **Iridanium**, and **Molten**. that can be obtained via the Smithing Table, the resources to make these new sets are very rare, and vary on location depending on the set.

I recommend using a recipe browser mod like [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) when playing this mod.

_**This mod is inspired by Terraria**_

Bugs, Questions, Feedback, or even Contributions can be held in my [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/wrbxxjWcQx).
